text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The last big race of Nature's senior year, the
Arima Kinen, is finally here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's an extremely important race for Nice Nature.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Hold on! Before that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ahem... Can I say something?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I'm gonna say something embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Thank you for leading me to this point.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I used to think my goal was unreachable, even
though I never even tried to run toward it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But not now. Now I understand that it's up to me
to make my dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: "Close, but not quite." That's me in a nutshell.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I run okay, but "okay" isn't gonna win me the gold.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm joining that race to show everyone what I can
do... Ugh, why did Teio have to join?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The once self-doubting Nice Nature from back
when I first met her is gone. As she is now, I'm
sure she can win.
choice_data_list: Get out there and shine, Nature!
Get out there and shine, Nature!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Right! I'm... I'm gonna shine like never before!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: And I'll bring the shiniest trophy back to you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This year's Arima Kinen is filled with great
runners. Among them, one has her gaze fixed on
Nice Nature, eyes gleaming.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I've been waiting for you, Nature.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So, what do you think? You can still take back
what you said last time!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Really? In that case, I'll take you up on that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Well, that's what I would've said before.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not taking it back. I'll say it again and
again.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm going to win!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! That's the spirit!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's on! In case you've forgotten, I'm prepared to
remind you as many times as necessary...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I am the Invincible Teio!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I know. More than you could ever guess.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But you know, I have what it takes to be amazing
as well.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone around me knows it. My trainer knows
it... and I know it too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So I'm not losing!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm going to be the star of this year's Arima Kinen!
